title: Joy Harmon: A Famous Actress from an Old Movie
summary: Joy Harmon was an actress who lived to be 87 years old. She is best known for a short scene in the movie Cool Hand Luke, where she washes a car. In this scene, she uses a sponge and soap, and prisoners watch her. She did not speak in the movie, but her character was called Lucille. Joy started as a child model and was in many TV shows and movies from the 1950s to 1970s. After acting, she worked at Disney and opened a bakery. She had three children and nine grandchildren. She died at home in Los Angeles after being sick with pneumonia.

background_read: Joy Harmon was an American actress who became famous for a brief role in the 1967 film Cool Hand Luke. She started her career as a child model and appeared in many TV shows during the 1960s. Her most memorable scene involved washing a car, which made her popular even though she had no lines. After retiring from acting, she worked behind the scenes at Disney and ran a bakery in Los Angeles. She passed away in 2026 at age 87, leaving behind a family and fans who remembered her from that iconic movie moment.

perspectives.description: Joy Harmon is remembered for a short but iconic scene in Cool Hand Luke that defined her acting career.
